title: Geepas 4-in-1 Hand Blender with Electric Whisk, 860ML Vegetable Chopper & 600ML Beaker | 200W Stick Blender, Soup Mixer, Hand Immersion blender| Mini Food Processor for Baby Food Soup Fruits Egg Whisk
features: ✅ 4 APPLIANCES IN ONE, CREATE IDEAL CONSISTENCY - This hand blender comes with perfect 200W power which fits you’re grinding requirements. The ideal solution if you love cooking but have to swap between appliances: Includes 860 ml capacity chopping bowl, 600ML Beaker, whisk attachment and blending leg. Great for blending dairy products, fruits, vegetables, sauces, fruit juices, soups, shakes, baby food and more.

✅ 200W MOTOR, SINGLE SPEED SETTING - Your hand blender is highly powerful and prepared to blend whatever ingredients you fancy, from delicious fruits such as strawberries and raspberries to a variety of vegetables. Simple to use, effective single speed and ready to blend up whatever you throw its way; and tailor your needs to the recipe.

✅ 860ML CHOPPER BOWL & 600ML BEAKER, WHISK ATTACHMENTS - A spacious and transparent jar will allow you to prepare a full portion and control the degree of chopping. Whisk attachment included. The markings on this roomy beaker will aid you in measuring out all of your creations - with a 600ML capacity, this is the perfect beaker for smoothies and sauces, and plenty more.

✅ BEAUTIFUL DESIGN & STAINLESS STEEL BLADE - Ergonomic grip for easy blending and anti-splash guard for those messy meals! The stainless steel blades ensure durability and performance and it is easy for you to finish your baby foods likes’ juice and pure, green porridge and more. Ultra-hard stainless steel blades to optimise blending results and reduce suction.

✅ DETACHABLE STICK, 2 YEAR WARRANTY - The stick is made of sturdy food grade, high strength ABS plastic material and stainless steel which can be removed easily. Removable parts are dishwasher safe for easy cleaning and convenient for minimal storage space.
description: Product Description 2 SPEED SETTINGS Easy to push buttons on an ergonomic handle. STRONG STAINLESS STEEL BLADES The stainless steel blades ensure durability and performance. MULTI - FUNCTIONAL Great for blending dairy products, fruits, vegetables, sauces, fruit juices, soups, shakes, baby food and more. QUICK & SIMPLE TO USE Remove and connect the attachments with ease. SAFETY GUARANTEED Made from sturdy, food grade, high-strength ABS plastic. PREPARE FOOD LIKE A PRO Ergonomic grip for easy blending and anti-splash guard for those to prepare food like a pro. 600 ML BEAKER With a 600ML capacity, this is the perfect beaker for smoothies and sauces, and plenty more. 860 ML CHOPPING BOWL Includes 860 ml capacity chopping bowl, 600ML Beaker, whisk attachment and blending leg.
